description: SQL guard regex matches forbidden keywords inside string literals, blocking legitimate organization-name searches like `WHERE UPPER(ORGANIZATION_NM) LIKE '%CREATE%'` or '%DELETE%' (the very pattern the system prompt instructs the model to use for company-name lookups).
reproducer: .venv/bin/python -c "from text2sql.db import validate_select; validate_select(\"SELECT * FROM client_product WHERE ORGANIZATION_NM LIKE '%DELETE%'\")" raises SQLError

description: execute_sql runs `cur.execute(safe_sql)` with no bind values, yet system_prompt instructs the model to use parametrised SQL like `UPPER(ORGANIZATION_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(:name) || '%'`. Any query containing `:name` (or any unbound `:foo`) will reach Oracle and raise ORA-01008 'not all variables bound'.
reproducer: validate_select accepts a query with `:name` (verified); db.run_query has no binds parameter and never supplies one; system_prompt instructs the model to write `:name`.

description: Agent's nudge loop returns model-hallucinated `last_text` as final answer when the model never emits a tool_call across all iterations (common with Ollama tool-calling reliability). User receives a fabricated answer with zero DB grounding, exit code 0.
reproducer: agent.py:88-100 appends nudge and continues; agent.py:135-143 returns `last_text.strip()` when ctx.final is None and force_final fails because last_result is None.

description: validate_result is purely advisory. The model can call final_answer first (or right after execute_sql) without ever calling validate_result, or call validate_result with `min_rows=0` and no other expectations to get a vacuous ok=True. final_answer dispatches and sets ctx.final regardless. The 'обязательный шаг' rule in the prompt is unenforced.
reproducer: dispatch('final_answer', ...) with empty ctx (no execute_sql, no validate) sets ctx.final and returns {'ok': True} — verified.

description: _force_final_answer uses the function parameter `cfg` (which may be None when caller invoked `run_agent(question)` without cfg) instead of the locally-resolved `cfg_eff`. `cfg.sql_model` raises AttributeError, caught silently, and the user gets 'Не удалось сформировать ответ' even though valid query results exist in ctx.last_result.
reproducer: Call `run_agent('Q')` with cfg defaulted to None, exhaust iterations → _force_final_answer(client, cfg=None, ...) → cfg.sql_model crashes inside the try/except → returns None.

description: inspect_schema is case-sensitive on the table name. `CLIENT_PRODUCT` (Oracle's canonical uppercase) or `Client_Product` return error 'Таблица не найдена' instead of metadata; the LLM may then refuse to write any SQL.
reproducer: dispatch('inspect_schema', {'table':'CLIENT_PRODUCT'}, ctx) returns {'error': "Таблица 'CLIENT_PRODUCT' не найдена", ...} — verified.

description: Oracle optimizer hints (`/*+ ... */ SELECT ...`) and `EXPLAIN PLAN FOR SELECT ...` are rejected because the head check only inspects the first 6 chars after stripping `(` and whitespace — comments aren't stripped. Hints are common for warehouse-style aggregations the agent will issue.
reproducer: validate_select('/*+ PARALLEL(client_product, 4) */ SELECT * FROM client_product') raises 'Разрешены только SELECT/WITH' — verified.

description: No per-query timeout (no `cur.callTimeout`, no connection-level limit). LLM-generated full-table scans on client_product (no MONTH_DT filter or wrong index hint) can run unbounded. Combined with max_iterations=8 and one fresh connection per call (db.py:112), a single user question can hang Oracle indefinitely with no client-side bail-out.
reproducer: db.run_query opens connect→cursor→execute with default settings, no callTimeout or cursor cancellation.

description: Domain rule mismatch risk: system_prompt states balances (CA_LCY_SUM, DEP_SUM) are *monthly averages per client* and should be aggregated AVG between months; but sql_examples in metadata.py (e.g. `SELECT SUM(CA_LCY_SUM) ... GROUP BY MONTH_DT` and `SUM(DEP_SUM) WHERE MONTH_DT BETWEEN ...`) demonstrate SUM-across-months patterns. For multi-month balance questions the model is likely to copy the example and double/N-times-count balances. validate_result cannot detect this — wrong-but-plausible numbers pass silently.
reproducer: Inspect metadata.py:418-419 example 'остатки по сегментам' uses SUM, and prompt rule clashes with this when a user asks 'остатки на счетах за 2025 год' — model will SUM 12 monthly averages.

description: final_answer.text never cross-validated against last_result rows. Model can place any number into text; supporting_data is optional and not checked. Combined with the unenforced validate step (finding #4), a hallucinated number reaches stdout as the canonical answer with exit code 0.
reproducer: dispatch('final_answer', {'text':'Доход 999 млрд (выдумано)'}, ctx) → ok=True, ctx.final set; no comparison to last_result.

description: No tests cover the agent loop (agent.py) — neither the tool-call loop nor _force_final_answer. The bug in finding #5 (cfg=None passed to fallback) and the no-tool-call hallucination fallback in finding #3 are entirely uncovered.
reproducer: ls tests/ shows no test_agent.py; grep run_agent in tests returns nothing.
